name: The Unit: Idol Rebooting Project
overview: Idols who failed to impress the audience after their debut are given another chance to be back on stage in The Unit. Korean top producers will give them a chance to shine in a brand new unit with new members, concepts and content.

trailers.title: 아이돌 리부팅 프로젝트 더 유닛 - [Teaser.1] 아이돌 리부팅 프로젝트 ㅣ KBS방송
